name: Star Map 25 — Profile walkthrough
description: Ten tutorial-style levels tied to investigations and features; each unlocks a named capability in the monitor.

levels.title: First auspex ping
levels.feature: Investigations tracked on your profile; reward multiplier snapshot saved.

levels.title: Segmentum sweep
levels.feature: Coordinated monitoring grid highlights your progress path.

levels.title: Lore clearance
levels.feature: Lore panels prioritize unlocked systems; quick-jump from grid cells.

levels.title: Tactical overlay
levels.feature: 3D map: hover highlights, click selects systems for intel.

levels.title: Deep void
levels.feature: Planet archive: five-level drill-down per world (xenos line included).

levels.title: Hyperspace calculus
levels.feature: 4D view: temporal/warp axis visualized (color + scale encoding).

levels.title: Bastion economics
levels.feature: Buildup and daily reset hints emphasized in profile sync.

levels.title: Dominion threshold
levels.feature: Per-point award history (base × multiplier) stored on profile.

levels.title: Segmentum veritas
levels.feature: AI tactical hints context includes your walkthrough tier.

levels.title: Imperium cartograph
levels.feature: Full map mastery: all walkthrough features active; golden monitor state.
